name: Montego Packs O' Purrs Tuna & Rosemary - 200g
shortDescription: Specially crafted to support your cat’s overall wellbeing, these treats provide a great source of protein, essential fatty acids (Omega-3 & 6), and taurine , promoting heart health, a shiny coat, and playful energy. Not suitable for kittens.
description: Treat your feline friend to a savory and aromatic snack with Montego Packs O’ Purrs Tuna & Rosemary - irresistibly tasty, soft, and packed with wholesome goodness! Made with premium ingredients like real tuna, fish oil, and dried rosemary , these chewy treats are as nutritious as they are delicious. Specially crafted to support your cat’s overall wellbeing, these treats provide a great source of protein, essential fatty acids (Omega-3 & 6), and taurine , promoting heart health, a shiny coat, and playful energy. Perfect for everyday rewards or special bonding moments, these soft treats are mess-free and easy to serve. Key Benefits Irresistible tuna flavor with a hint of rosemary cats love Supports heart health, vision, and a shiny coat Soft, chewy texture perfect for all cats Made with high-quality, nutrient-rich ingredients Enriched with taurine and essential fatty acids Typical Analysis (per 100g) Crude Protein 20% | Moisture 16.5% | Total Fat 5% | Crude Fibre 2% | Crude Ash 5% | Calcium 0.6% | Phosphorus 0.5% | Sodium 0.9% | Omega-3 0.65% | Taurine 0.125% | Metabolizable Energy 351 kcal Storage & Usage Feeding Instructions: Serve as a treat or reward in between meals. Suitable for cats of all breeds and life stages - adjust quantity according to size, age, and activity level. Always provide fresh drinking water. Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight. Reseal the pouch tightly after each use to maintain freshness. Once opened, consume within 30 days for the best quality. Make treat time a delight with Montego Packs O’ Purrs Tuna & Rosemary - the perfect combination of taste, texture, and nutrition your cat will adore. Packed with real tuna, aromatic rosemary, and essential nutrients, every bite supports a happy, healthy, and purr-worthy life.
